steps.name: Given user goes to Series section
And user clicks play button on first video
When user plays the first video
Then user verifies BFLMarketsSeries player functions Play,Mute,Speed,Quality,Fullscreen,Forward,Rewind,SeekToEndNoReplay,CloseVideo using player "myKpointPlayer"
